description: Perform a Mann-Whitney U test on the 'Invisibility Cloak' dataset (/home/ga/Documents/JASP/InvisibilityCloak.csv) to analyze mischief behavior. Compare 'Mischief' as the dependent variable between the 'Cloak' and 'No Cloak' grouping conditions. Include rank biserial correlation effect size and descriptive statistics in the analysis. Save the JASP project to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/MannWhitneyCloak.jasp and create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/mann_whitney_report.txt containing the test statistic (W or U), p-value, rank biserial correlation, sample sizes, and a one-sentence conclusion regarding significance at alpha=0.05.
